title: Malindi、Kilifi — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Malindi、Kilifi的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Malindi是Kilifi的一个城市，人口约118,000。A coastal resort town in southeastern Kenya, known for its beautiful beaches, coral reefs, and historic Portuguese architecture.
